nodes.title: Lagu Gugur Gunung
nodes.subtitle: Bahagian Saron
nodes.description: Lagu Gugur Gunung is a traditional folk song in Indonesia. The saron component of the song comprises the main melody.

nodes.title: Test Song
nodes.subtitle: test
nodes.description: This is a filler description text. This will give a brief description of the instrument used in this level

nodes.title: Charles

nodes.description: This is a filler description text. This will give a brief description of the instrument used in this level

nodes.title: Lagu Gugur Gunung
nodes.subtitle: Bahagian Bonang Barung
nodes.description: The melody of Lagu Gugur Gunung will be elaborated on further with the bonang barung instrument

nodes.title: A day at the carpenter's
nodes.subtitle: Story-1
nodes.description: A carpenter is working on carving a wooden bench. Some friends come to visit him.

nodes.title: Children of the kampung
nodes.subtitle: Story-2
nodes.description: Some children play around in the village fields on a bright weekend afternoon.

nodes.title: Keropok making
nodes.subtitle: Story-3
nodes.description: Two mothers are making traditional keropok. A sneaky child shows up on a mission to steal some.

nodes.title: A day in the classroom
nodes.subtitle: Story-4
nodes.description: It is a school day. Multiple children are gathered in a classroom, and some are dozing off...

nodes.title: A slow day with the cats
nodes.subtitle: Story-5
nodes.description: Two cats relax together in the fields with nothing to bother them... until they encounter a rude surprise.

nodes.title: Preparing a feast
nodes.subtitle: Story-6
nodes.description: Women prepare for a dinner feast for their families together.

nodes.title: A performance in the night
nodes.subtitle: Story-7
nodes.description: Night falls in the kampung. People gather to watch a wayang kulit performance in high spirits.

nodes.title: Lagu Gugur Gunung
nodes.subtitle: Bahagian Kendang
nodes.description: In this level, you will play a kendang, a drum instrument crucial to most gamelan ensembles.

nodes.title: Lagu Gugur Gunung
nodes.subtitle: Semua Bahagian
nodes.description: The final song, with all instruments included
